TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kalisahan = Gaga mniq Taytung Yeynpingsyang ka alang Kalisahan. 51 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 180 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 176 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 4 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun82%, Amis4%, Paiwan1%, Puyuma1%, Thau1%, ni rahuq na o10%.
S.PHON: = kalisaħan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ jənpiŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ kalisaħan. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, pujuma*%, tħau*%, ni ɾaħuq na o**%.
S.FORM: = Kalisahan = Gaga mniq Taytung Yeynpingsyang ka alang Kalisahan. 51 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 180 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 176 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 4 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun82%, Amis4%, Paiwan1%, Puyuma1%, Thau1%, ni rahuq na o10%.
S.PHON: = kalisaħan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ jənpiŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ kalisaħan. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, pujuma*%, tħau*%, ni ɾaħuq na o**%.
